goal: Remove stale assets/agents-md-default.md and its gitignore entry

summary.title: Remove stale assets/ directory + its gitignore stanza
summary.what: Deletes assets/agents-md-default.md (pre-rc3 AGENTS.md draft no code references) and removes the assets/ entry from .gitignore. The actual AGENTS.md template lives at internal/engine/templates/agents-md.md embedded via go:embed.
summary.why: The file drifted three releases out of date — still referenced removed mainline pr-trailer, wrong github org, no v0.2/v0.3 workflow. Keeping a gitignore pointer to a deleted thing is long-term debt.
summary.user_goal: Cleaner repo state pre-MVP-rollout — no orphaned files that could mislead a new contributor reading the codebase.

decisions.point: Delete the dir entirely vs keep + update content
decisions.rationale: No code references it; the embedded template is the canonical source. Keeping a duplicate is just another thing to drift.

behavioral_changes: assets/ directory no longer exists; .gitignore no longer references it
